body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45222", "cvss": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-732", "name": "Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource"}], "description": "Summarize versions through 0.14.1, fixed in commit 0cfb0fb, creates the daemon configuration directory and file with default filesystem permissions that may be world-readable on Unix-like systems, allowing local attackers to read bearer tokens and API credentials stored in ~/.summarize/daemon.json. A local attacker can exploit these permissive permissions to read the daemon bearer token and persisted provider credentials, enabling unauthorized access to the daemon or recovery of sensitive API keys.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00098, "percentile": 0.00998}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qp7v-gjgg-4mj6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T16:47:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp7v-gjgg-4mj6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qp7v-gjgg-4mj6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45222"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T19:16:27Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T21:31:34Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45222", "https://github.com/steipete/summarize/pull/214", "https://github.com/steipete/summarize/commit/0cfb0fb99777a87a7b02082b5e4bd449f8dd6175", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/summarize-insecure-daemon-configuration-file-permissions", "https://github.com/steipete/summarize/releases/tag/v0.15.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp7v-gjgg-4mj6"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/steipete/summarize", "summary": "@steipete/summarize allows local attackers to read bearer tokens and API credentials stored in ~/.summarize/daemon.json", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T16:47:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp7v-gjgg-4mj6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.15.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@steipete/summarize"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.15.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @steipete/summarize allows local attackers to read bearer tokens and API credentials stored in ~/.summarize/daemon.json
